overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a boat approaching a tropical stilt village during golden hour. The player navigates through turquoise water, passes wooden posts, docks at a wooden walkway, encounters an NPC, and observes fish swimming below the surface. The scene features warm sunset lighting, scattered clouds, and traditional wooden architecture on stilts.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water approaching coastal stilt village

agents.ego_description: piloting a small boat through calm turquoise water toward a coastal stilt village with a stone tower in the distance

entered.detail: cluster of wooden houses built on stilts over the water along the shoreline
tall stone tower structure on the hillside in the distance
wooden support pillars of the pier extending into the water
wooden box with fishing net visible in the boat

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from a boat on calm turquoise water, approaching a coastal stilt village during golden hour. The sun creates a warm backlight behind the wooden structures and a distant stone tower. The boat moves steadily forward with fishing equipment visible in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water with scattered palm islands

events.description: camera pans upward to the sky and rotates right to reveal small palm-covered islands

agents.ego_description: continuing to boat forward while panning the camera to survey the surrounding islands and cloudy sky

entered.detail: small island covered with palm trees visible to the right
vertical wooden posts sticking out of the water marking the approach to the dock

segments.scene_description: The camera pans upward and right to reveal a dramatic cloudy sky and small palm-covered islands scattered across the water. The boat continues moving forward, passing wooden posts that mark the channel toward the dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock walkway between stilt houses

events.description: boat arrives at wooden dock and player transitions to walking on the wooden walkway
NPC man in red shirt appears walking toward the camera along the dock

agents.ego_description: docking the boat and walking along the wooden walkway through the stilt village, passing between wooden houses on stilts

notable_agents.action: bald man in red shirt walking toward the camera along the wooden dock

entered.detail: wooden plank walkway elevated over the water connecting the stilt houses
small green boat tied to the dock posts

segments.scene_description: The boat arrives at the wooden dock and the player disembarks onto a wooden walkway between traditional stilt houses. An NPC man in a red shirt walks toward and passes the camera. The environment is sheltered under the wooden structures with the green boat visible moored nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: water surface beneath the dock with visible fish

events.description: camera tilts down from the walkway to focus on the water below the dock
fish becomes visible swimming in the clear turquoise water beneath the surface

agents.ego_description: standing on the dock looking down at fish swimming in the clear water below, with the fishing rod visible

entered.detail: large fish swimming just below the surface of the clear water
wooden structural beams visible beneath the water surface

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down to focus on the clear turquoise water beneath the dock, revealing a fish swimming near the surface and submerged wooden structures. The fishing rod is visible in the foreground, and the stilt village remains visible in the background across the water as the sun reflects off the surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the open turquoise waters of a tropical coast into the sheltered heart of a stilt village during the golden hour. It begins with a steady forward glide toward wooden structures and a distant stone tower, with fishing equipment visible in the foreground against a warm backlight. As the camera pans upward and right to reveal a dramatic cloudy sky and palm-covered islands, the boat passes through a channel marked by wooden posts. The scene then shifts as the boat arrives at a dock, moving the perspective onto a wooden walkway where an NPC in a red shirt passes by beneath the shade of traditional stilt houses. Finally, the camera tilts down to the clear water below the dock to reveal a swimming fish and submerged beams, while the sun reflects off the surface with the village stretching out in the background.
